name: Strata

verdict.text: Broad no-fee earner, though cash-back is capped at half a cent/point

earn_rates.category: Hotels, car rentals & attractions — booked via cititravel.com
Self-Select category — one choice, changeable quarterly

earn_note: The Self-Select category defaults to streaming services and can be swapped once per calendar quarter among fitness clubs, streaming, live entertainment, cosmetics/barber/salon, or pet supply stores. It's a nice bit of flexibility for a $0 card, though the categories are narrower than the flat 3x/2x tiers on Chase Freedom Unlimited or Amex Blue Cash.

points.note: The catch with a no-fee ThankYou card: cash-back redemption is only 0.5¢/point — half of what Strata Premier/Elite cardholders get — and transfers to airline/hotel partners go through at a reduced 1:0.7 ratio instead of 1:1. Linking this account to a Strata Premier or Strata Elite card in Citi's online banking pools the points and unlocks the full 1¢ cash rate and 1:1 transfers on everything this card earns — the main reason serious users pair it with a fee-paying Citi card rather than holding it alone.

transfer_partners.highlight: Same 22-partner roster as Strata Premier and Strata Elite — American Airlines, JetBlue, Flying Blue, Virgin Atlantic, Choice, Wyndham, Preferred Hotels, and more — but every transfer from this card alone goes through at a reduced 1:0.7 ratio.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: American Airlines AAdvantage was reinstated as a permanent ThankYou transfer partner in July 2025 after being dropped in 2022.

protection_note: This is a bare-bones no-fee card on the protection side — Citi stripped trip, purchase, and warranty coverage from its lower-tier cards years ago and never added them back here. What's left is standard fraud monitoring and Mastercard ID Theft Protection, nothing more.
rental_note: No rental car coverage of any kind. Use a different card — or decline this one — when renting.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee applies
services.detail: 3% on purchases made outside the US — not built for international use.

services.name: Citi Entertainment
services.detail: Presale access to concert, sports, and event tickets.

services.name: Citi Flex Pay
services.detail: Convert eligible purchases to fixed monthly payments while still earning points.

services.name: Free FICO Score access
services.detail: View your FICO Score at no cost through the Citi app or site.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns ThankYou Points on their spend (into your account)
No status, lounge access, or meaningful protections to share — this tier doesn't have them

additional_cards.note: No cost to add users, but there's little to share beyond the earn rate — this card's value is almost entirely in the points, not in perks.

timeline.text: Citi Rewards+ was restructured and renamed Citi Strata as part of the broader ThankYou 'Strata' family rebrand (Citi Premier had already become Strata Premier in May 2024; Strata Elite launched separately later in 2025). Existing Rewards+ accounts were converted automatically on this date — cardholders kept their account, credit line, and $0 fee, and were mailed a new Strata-branded card; no application or hard pull was required. Two signature Rewards+ perks were dropped in the process and did not carry over: the automatic round-up to the nearest 10 points on every purchase, and the 10% points rebate on the first 100,000 points redeemed each year. In exchange, cardholders got the current 5x/3x/2x category structure, which earns faster for most spending patterns.
